meaning: n.含蓄,储蓄的东西(词、语等),内涵
examples: The meaning of children's books lies in conveying the profound connotation behind the story.
The very impossibility of absoluteness in the definition of certain nouns adds to the levels of connotation they may reach.
As opposed to black, white usually has a positive connotation.
Without technically altering the definition, shifts in usage can give a word a new connotation.
And that has a real negative connotation to, you know, a lot of Americans.
